ddls:
CREATE TABLE "power_consumption_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power consumption parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the power consumption parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "typical_value" REAL /* Typical value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter values */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Description of the condition under which the parameter values are applicable */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., microcontroller, integrated circuit) */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Temperature range under which the parameter is measured */,
  "humidity_range" TEXT /* Humidity range under which the parameter is measured */,
  "voltage_range" TEXT /* Voltage range under which the parameter is measured */,
  "power_supply" TEXT /* Type of power supply (e.g., battery, wall adapter) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the parameter */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the parameter */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_consumption_parameters_unit FOREIGN KEY ("unit") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the device model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the device model was first produced */,
  "end_of_life_date" TEXT /* Date when the device model will reach its end of life */,
  "power_consumption_profile" TEXT /* General power consumption profile (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the device model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the device model was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the device model */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the device model was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operating condition */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Temperature range under which the condition applies */,
  "humidity_range" TEXT /* Humidity range under which the condition applies */,
  "voltage_range" TEXT /* Voltage range under which the condition applies */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the condition */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the condition */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measurement */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit of measurement */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the unit of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter version */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the parameter */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the version became effective */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_versions_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES power_consumption_parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_model_parameters" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device model */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the power consumption parameter */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operating condition */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the association */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the association was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the association */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the association was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_model_parameters_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES operating_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_model_parameters_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES power_consumption_parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_model_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES device_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., engineering, management) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES power_consumption_parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., analysis, optimization) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
